parameters.columns: message_id, user_id, channel, text, media, ts, context, metadata

parameters.functionCode: const p = $input.first().json;\nreturn [{ json: { channel: p.channel, message_id: p.message_id, sender_id: p.sender_id, text: p.text, hash: p.hash } }];

meta.description: InitCore v1.0 — Adapter Webform genérico. CORS configurado, verifica reCAPTCHA y valida campos obligatorios antes de normalizar.
